<details>
<summary>📝 Walkthrough</summary>

## Walkthrough

The PR refactors the `_create_shear` function in monai/transforms/utils.py to compose individual single-axis shear matrices rather than directly assigning off-diagonal elements. The 2D implementation builds a rank-3 shear matrix via sequential multiplication of elementary shear matrices, while the 3D implementation composes six elementary shear matrices in a loop. This corrects incorrect multi-axis shear behavior by ensuring shear operations are area-preserving and composable. Test expectations are updated across three test files to reflect the corrected numerical outputs from the refactored shear matrices.

## Estimated code review effort

🎯 3 (Moderate) | ⏱️ ~25 minutes

</details>
